{{- partialCached "head.html" . }}
{{- with default "img/huggingface-logo-48x48.png" site.Params.huggingface.siteLogo }} {{- with resources.Get . }} {{- end }} {{- end }}
{{- partial "header/menu.html" (dict "menuID" "main" "page" .) -}}
{{- block "main" . }}{{- end }}
